signals.npcLine: Crypto tides turn dark, whispers of shrinking stacks echo.
signals.questPulse: Market cap bleeding, shadows close on digital credits.
signals.worldFeed: Global crypto shimmer fades amid rising digital fear.
signals.clueEvent: Declining value stirs unrest in neon bazaars.

signals.npcLine: MOVR gears rev; new code breaks silence in the net.
signals.questPulse: MOVR surges quietly against the dismal market flow.
signals.worldFeed: MOVR flickers with potential amid widespread digital gloom.
signals.clueEvent: Unseen forces boost MOVR's signal in data fog.

signals.npcLine: SOMPI’s trace blips intensify; code fragments found nearby.
signals.questPulse: SOMPI rising beneath market's dark pulse, hidden paths emerge.
signals.worldFeed: SOMPI nodes activate across shadowed networks.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted SOMPI patterns detected in darknet chatter.

signals.npcLine: Fear grips data veins; operators brace for cyber downturn.
signals.questPulse: Sentiment sagging low, chaos brews in code markets.
signals.worldFeed: Digital dread spikes, traders vanish into neon haze.
signals.clueEvent: Rising fear index triggers black market net movements.

signals.npcLine: SPK sparkles briefly before fading into data void.
signals.questPulse: Small gains for SPK lost in looming market storm.
signals.worldFeed: SPK streaks across the grid, then silent once more.
signals.clueEvent: Burst of SPK activity spotted in sector ##G.
